title: Retro Aviation Travel Poster AI
sourceTitle: Retro Aviation Travel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional polar air-route navigator with winged helmet and mission patches. Scene / Context: icy alpine airship port, brass rescue towers, rockets and atmospheric horizon depth. Source Recipe Translation: retro aviation travel poster. Preserve these source mechanics: distressed 1940s-1960s Art Deco propaganda travel poster, teal, cream, rust red, vintage gold, navy, aged paper grain. Concrete social variant uses fictional polar air-route navigator with winged helmet and mission patches in icy alpine airship port, brass rescue towers, rockets and atmospheric horizon depth. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: distressed 1940s-1960s Art Deco propaganda travel poster, teal, cream, rust red, vintage gold, navy, aged paper grain; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: MOON HARBOR / AIR ROUTE 07; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: retro aviation travel poster. Hero Subject: fictional desert airship cartographer in chrome goggles and cream flight suit, heroic waist-up pose. Scene or Context: retro-futuristic aviation propaganda poster with golden dunes, floating airship routes and sunburst sky. Composition: vertical 4:5 poster with strong central figure, diagonal flight-path graphics and bold readable expedition title; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: vintage aviation travel poster, retro-futuristic propaganda color blocking, grainy print texture, cinematic heroic lighting; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: SKY ATLAS / DESERT ROUTE; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: fictional character only, no real airline logo, no military insignia, no copied IP, no watermark, no random text; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
